column8: port collapses orig 9-state DDraw surface flow (CreateMenuStringLabelSurface, sprite-rect moves, BltColorFill, primary/secondary buffers) into 9-state simplified FSM; button-handler logic for Configure P1 (idx 1) / Configure P2 (idx 3) / OK (idx 4) preserved; orig's per-input-source device cycling on btn 0/2 not ported (no DDraw input enumeration UI)

REGR#2 per permanent_l4_residual.md: orig SFX cycle 3-mode gated by DXSound::CanDo3D() (falls back to 2-mode if 0); port has unconditional 3-mode at td5_frontend.c:7572-7574 (justified as D3D11 always-3D-capable); volume step *10 already fixed at :7578/7585 matches orig; music-test branch (btn 3 → TD5_SCREEN_MUSIC_TEST) and OK (btn 4) preserved

orig case-6 button writers target g_specialEncounterUnlockA/B_PROVISIONAL (btn 1/2) and gSpecialEncounterConfigShadow (btn 3); port writes dedicated s_game_option_checkpoint_timers/traffic/cops globals; whether port storage maps to same orig DAT addresses or to independent shadows requires address-level verification of PROVISIONAL global identities. Other button handlers (0 laps clamp 0..3 wrap, 4 difficulty clamp 0..2 wrap, 5 dynamics ^=1, 6 collisions ^=1, 7 OK) match orig

port omits orig DXD3D::CanFog() gate at case-0 (orig creates SNK_FoggingButTxt as preview-button when CanFog==0; port always normal button) — D3D11 always supports fog; case-6 handler matches orig: btn 0 display-mode cycle + td5_save_set_display_mode, btn 1 fog toggle, btn 2 speed-units toggle, btn 3 camera-damping clamp 0..9, btn 4 OK → OPTIONS_HUB; surface management collapsed per D3D11_BACKEND

port case-6 button mapping matches orig (btn 0 = g_twoPlayerSplitMode = (delta+val)&1, btn 1 = g_twoPlayerCatchupAssist += delta clamped 0..9, btn 2 = OK → OPTIONS_HUB); multiple inline [CONFIRMED @ 0x420F40] / [CONFIRMED @ 0x42106B] / [CONFIRMED @ 0x4210B3] / [CONFIRMED @ 0x4210F7] tags; surface mgmt simplified per D3D11_BACKEND but logic byte-faithful
